underlying_goal: Ship the INT-107 scribe concurrency feature, add monitoring/alerting in Honeycomb terraform, update the /ship workflow command, and fix terraform apply failures
friction_detail: Terraform apply failed due to non-existent columns and invalid calculated field syntax; Claude also pushed fix to the PR branch not realizing it had already been merged to main.
brief_summary: User continued shipping INT-107, updated the /ship command with a Bugbot step, added Honeycomb concurrency monitoring via terraform, and fixed a terraform apply failure — mostly achieved with one terraform syntax issue and a branch confusion.
